name: python3-fastbencode
title: python3-fastbencode
description:
Fast bencode implementation
Fast Python implementation of the bencode serialization
mechanism used by the BitTorrent protocol and others.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-fastbencode because Fast bencode implementation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-fastbencode as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-fastbencode with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-fastbencode --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
